summary: WiseDrive CRM - 8 New Features Testing Complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All 8 features validated through Playwright UI testing.

1_numeric_input_bug_fix.details: NumericInput in payroll preview accepts multiple digits without jumping. Tested typing '12345' - value persisted correctly. Debounce mechanism working properly.

2_lop_tracking_in_attendance.details: GET /api/hr/attendance/calendar returns calendar data with LOP counts. Legend includes 'lop' status with red color (#EF4444). Employee summary includes lop_days and half_days counts. Kalyan shows '1LOP' in summary column.

3_hr_update_attendance_status.details: POST /api/hr/attendance/update-day works correctly. HR can click on any day cell to open edit modal. Status dropdown includes: Present, Absent/LOP, Half Day, Leave (Approved), Weekend/Holiday. Notes field available. 'absent' normalizes to 'lop' in backend.

4_date_restrictions_attendance.details: Month dropdown only shows current and past months (January, February for Feb 2026). Year dropdown only shows current and past years (2026, 2025, 2024). Future day cells are grayed out and not clickable. Backend rejects future date updates with 400 error.

5_city_master_for_countries.details: Countries tab shows 'Cities' column with city counts (India: 5 cities). Edit country modal includes Cities section with add/remove functionality. Cities displayed as tags with X button to remove. Add city input with + button works correctly.

6_lop_in_payroll_preview.details: Payroll Preview shows 'LOP Days' column and 'LOP Deduction' column. LOP deductions calculated correctly (e.g., John Sales: ₹50,500 LOP deduction). Total Deductions includes LOP amounts.

7_payslips_tab_employee_modal.details: Employee modal includes 'Payslips' tab. GET /api/hr/payroll/employee/{id}/payslips endpoint returns payslip list. Tab shows 'No payslips available' message when no payroll confirmed. Description explains payslips are generated when payroll is confirmed.

8_hidden_emergent_badge.details: Emergent badge has CSS 'display: none !important' applied. Badge element exists in DOM but is not visible. Verified via Playwright - badge.is_visible() returns False.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 5 employees.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 new features fully tested and working: 1) NumericInput debounce fix prevents value jumping, 2) LOP tracking shows in attendance calendar legend and employee summary, 3) HR can edit attendance via click-to-edit modal, 4) Date restrictions prevent future month/year selection, 5) City Master allows adding/removing cities in country modal, 6) LOP deductions shown in payroll preview, 7) Payslips tab in employee modal ready for confirmed payroll, 8) Emergent badge hidden via CSS.
